_doc: ALLOW-LIST of skips (⊘ = neither pass nor fail). Every skip the suite emits MUST appear here, or the run REDS. why=corpus-absent → the leg needs a raw recording from the gitignored uploads/ corpus, so it cannot run on a fresh clone (CI, or the worktree CLAUDE.md §👥 mandates); point DEX_UPLOADS=<path> at a real corpus to actually run it. why=known-drift → a deliberate, documented environmental skip. Adding an entry here is a DELIBERATE act that shrinks the gate — justify it in the PR. See EFFICIENCY-AUDIT-FINDINGS-2026-07-12 §G1.
